subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the Sovereign, the True, the Manifest, which We have sent down from the heaven of Command and made them a guidance and a remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله الملک الحق المبین نزلناها من سماء الامر و جعلناها هدایه و ذکری
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
